title: Close the first Roblox real-data loop
why: Polaxory cannot iterate faster until shipped Roblox behavior produces aggregate data that changes the next task.
problem: The current repo has markdown strategy and early implementation seams, but no verified first-party Roblox telemetry or audited game-data research baseline.
scope: Define safe gameplay telemetry event schema
Emit round reward loop events from Roblox code seams
Normalize exports into aggregate repo snapshots
Audit existing game-data markdown evidence level
Expose latest snapshot in the Polaxory command room
acceptance_criteria: Telemetry schema exists and avoids raw private player identifiers in committed artifacts
Round-completion reward seam emits at least reward-loop events
Aggregate snapshot files can be generated under data/polaxory/roblox-snapshots/YYYY-MM-DD
Research markdown has evidence labels or is treated as assumption
/projects/polaxory can display actual/latest snapshot values when present
next_patch_order: Add command-room data panel fallback: No real data captured yet
evidence_policy: All game-data claims must be labeled first_party, roblox_public, external_public, playtest, desk_research, or assumption.
